scripts.format: npm run format:root && npm run format:api && npm run format:mobile
scripts.format:check: npm run format:root:check && npm run format:api:check && npm run format:mobile:check
scripts.format:root: prettier --write package.json services/core-api/package.json apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml compose.yaml .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md apps/admin-web/README.md apps/content-engine/README.md apps/mobile/README.md services/core-api/README.md
scripts.format:root:check: prettier --check package.json services/core-api/package.json apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml compose.yaml .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md apps/admin-web/README.md apps/content-engine/README.md apps/mobile/README.md services/core-api/README.md
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run analyze:mobile
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:api:e2e && npm run test:mobile
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build:api
